programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: From Feb. 5, 2021 From RP Funding Center in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: BKFC 58 features a stacked card from Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: BKFC 36
programme.desc: From Feb. 24, 2023. Features Alan Belcher vs. Arnold Adams for BKFC heavyweight championship, plus James Lilley vs. Bobby Taylor in bare-knuckle boxing action from Kenner, La.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Mixed martial arts league where athletes compete in a regular season, postseason and championship.

programme.desc: Main event: Timur Khizriev vs. Brendan Loughnane.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Jason Jackson defeats Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.desc: Replay from 4.4.25 Myrtle Beach Sports Center.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: From Arizona Athletic Grounds in Mesa, Ariz.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 2
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Martin Brown for BKFC lightweight title, Chad Mendes vs. Joshuah Alvarez. Plus Mike Perry vs. Julian Lane in bare knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla. From Feb. 19, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 3
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Mike Richman, light heavyweight championship bout. From Feb. 17, 2023 at Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania IV
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: BKFC 39
programme.desc: March 24, 2023. Features Reggie Barnett Jr. defending BKFC bantamweight title against Daniel Alvarez, plus Britain Hart vs. Jenny Clausius for BKFC women's strawweight title from Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Logan Storley vs. Brennan Ward, welterweight bout; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Steve Mowry, heavyweight bout; Dalton Rosta vs. Aaron Jeffery, middleweight bout; Sidney Outlaw vs. Islam Mamedov, lightweight bout. From Aug. 11, 2023 in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Johnny Eblen vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight championship bout; Aaron Pico vs. Pedro Carvalho, featherweights; Mads Burnell vs. Daniel Weichel, featherweights. From Sept. 23, 2023 in Dublin.

programme.desc: From Dick Howser Stadium in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.desc: From Dick Howser Stadium in Tallahassee, Fla.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From CHS Field in Saint Paul, Minn.

programme.title: BKFC 27
programme.desc: From Aug. 20, 2022. Features Mike Perry vs. Michael Page, plus Connor Tierney vs. Joe Elmore in bare knuckle boxing action from London.

programme.title: BKFC 28: Ferea vs. Starling
programme.desc: Features Christine Ferea vs. Taylor Starling for BKFC women's flyweight title, plus John Dodson vs. Ryan Benoit in bare knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico. From Aug. 27, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC 41
programme.desc: Features Mike Perry vs. Luke Rockhold, Eddie Alvarez vs. Chad Mendes, plus Christine Ferea vs. Bec Rawlings for BKFC women's flyweight title from Broomfield, Colo. From April 29, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 38
programme.desc: April 21, 2023. Features Dat Nguyen vs. Daniel Straus, plus Jake Bostwick vs. Isaac Doolittle in bare-knuckle boxing action from Delray Beach, Florida.

programme.desc: Justin Young, Evan Sofer, Eric Hicks, James Bord, Eric Persson, Eric Wasserson and Eric Worre playing $200/$400 No-Limit Hold'em.

programme.title: PaddyO Sucks at
programme.desc: Sucking at any given sport can be frustrating; sucking at navigating the backcountry can be terrifying.

programme.desc: Embark on an expedition to the top of the world to explore this relatively unknown land.

programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR's highly trained volunteers drop everything to rescue the injured in their community.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search & Rescue races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny is taking it to the next level with one goal in mind: being the best big wave rider in the world.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai Lenny competes against the world’s best big wave surfers in the WSL Big Wave World Tour event in Maui.

programme.title: 10:00am on a Tuesday
programme.desc: Behind the scenes look at an "average" weekday with professional climber Sasha DiGiulian.

programme.title: 10:00am on a Tuesday
programme.sub-title: A Day in the Climbing Life
programme.desc: Behind the scenes look at an "average" weekday with professional climber Sasha DiGiulian.

programme.title: Outdoor Eats
programme.desc: Chef Corso cooks up delicious gourmet backpacking meals while hiking Arizona trails.

programme.title: Outdoor Eats
programme.desc: Chef Corso cooks up delicious gourmet backpacking meals while hiking the trails of San Francisco.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: Self Hiking Boots and Lift Chair
programme.desc: In this episode, I set out to fix a missing element for a walk in the woods' self-hiking boots.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.desc: Carrying water is a hassle on long runs, so I’ve built a robot cooler that follows me on the road and trail.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: From Portland’s food scene to remote boat-building and legendary lobster hauls.

programme.title: The Outlaw Ocean
programme.desc: This episode takes us off the coast of England aboard Sealand, a micronation founded by a quixotic adventurer.

programme.title: The Outlaw Ocean
programme.desc: This episode investigates how some luxury cruise ships routinely use Magic Pipes to get rid of toxic waste.

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner heads to Kenya with Matt Jones where they ride one of the highest mountains in Africa.

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner, along with Matt Jones, head to Lesotho where they experience a different kind of racing.
